results.title: MedPlus puts ₹100 crore concierge healthcare project on hold after investor feedback
results.description: Gangadi Madhukar Reddy, MD & CEO, Medplus Health Services said the company had listened to shareholder concerns after the announcement triggered a sharp fall in its stock price.

results.title: Home delivered, medically tailored groceries improve diabetes control, reports research
results.description: A study from researchers at top US health insurance and medical services provider Kaiser Permanente, the Food is Medicine Institute at the Gerald J. and Dorothy R. Friedman School of Nutrition Science...
